findings: squad_leads_running is not sourced or calculated in stampede-monitor.sh; only squad_leads_launched vs squad_leads_target is shown (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:158-160,182-185)
workers_running sourced only from telemetry.workers_running with hard default 0; no fallback or reconciliation (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:162,185)
workers_completed falls back to atoms_received, workers_failed falls back to children_failed; not identical semantics (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:163-165,185-186)
atoms_received shown separately AND reused as fallback for completed; same signal as two counters (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:163,165-186)
Freshness from last_heartbeat_at/updated_at, but count accuracy not validated; warnings only check launch-proof presence (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:167-180)
